title: dbt Inline ML Preprocessing
description: A published dbt package that abstracts away the SQL needed to perform ML preprocessing techniques inline within a SELECT statement.

title: Helper Website for Students
description: An interactive site for my students that generated practice questions, visualizations, and a glossary to reinforce key economics concepts.

title: Q-Learning Auction Agent
description: A JavaScript app using single-state Q-Learning to teach an AI agent to bid optimally in a two-player sealed-bid auction.

title: Command Line Chess
description: A minimalist CLI chess app in Python. Play against another user, a random-move AI, or a simple cost-minimizing AI player.
